title: Fix ADV checklist reads

tasks.title: Add runtime checklist-read regression test
tasks.verification: RED evidence: `pnpm test -- src/adv-skill-backed-commands-assets.test.ts` exits 1 with the new runtime checklist-read regression test failing on current command references. Also surfaced pre-existing/unrelated adv-tron asset failure under the test invocation.
tasks.implementation_summary: Modified `plugin/src/adv-skill-backed-commands-assets.test.ts` to scan `.opencode/command/adv-*.md` for runtime directives pointing at `docs/checklists/*` or `~/.local/share/Advance`, and reconciled the embedded-methodology test by removing the `Canonical source` positive assertion.
tasks.notes: Added runtime command forbidden-pattern regression test and updated embedded-methodology assertion to no longer require `Canonical source`. Red evidence recorded: targeted asset test fails on current command checklist references as expected; unrelated adv-tron asset failure also appears in same invocation.

tasks.title: Remove runtime source-checklist directives from commands
tasks.verification: Exact search of `.opencode/command` for `docs/checklists/` returns no results. Targeted test invocation no longer reports the new runtime checklist-read regression failure; remaining reported failures are adv-improve asset expectation to update in tk-d08872d469c7 and unrelated adv-tron asset failure.
tasks.implementation_summary: Updated `adv-proposal`, `adv-discover`, `adv-prep`, `adv-review`, `adv-harden`, and `adv-improve` command files to remove checklist path directives and replace canonical-source wording with embedded runtime-source guidance or existing skill/fallback wording.
tasks.notes: Removed runtime checklist/source-path directives from targeted command files. Exact search of `.opencode/command` for `docs/checklists/` returns no results. Remaining test failures are covered by follow-up task for adv-improve asset expectations plus unrelated adv-tron asset drift.

tasks.title: Resolve adv-improve methodology source
tasks.verification: `pnpm test -- src/adv-improve-assets.test.ts src/adv-skill-backed-commands-assets.test.ts` no longer reports adv-improve or checklist-read failures; only remaining reported failure is unrelated pre-existing adv-tron asset expectation.
tasks.implementation_summary: Changed `plugin/src/adv-improve-assets.test.ts` so `/adv-improve` is validated against `skill("adv-improve")`, embedded fallback scan category wording, and absence of `improve-checklist.md`/`CHECKLIST` runtime references. The command already points to the loaded skill/fallback and the skill contains the six categories.
tasks.notes: Updated adv-improve asset expectation to require skill/fallback scan category guidance instead of runtime checklist path references. Existing skill already contains six-category current-state scan methodology. Test invocation now only reports unrelated adv-tron asset failure.

tasks.title: Add no-source-checklist spec and guidance updates
tasks.verification: `pnpm exec vitest run src/adv-skill-backed-commands-assets.test.ts --reporter=dot` passes: 1 file, 53 tests. Advisory token-budget warnings are warn-only and pre-existing.
tasks.implementation_summary: Updated `.adv/specs/advance-meta/spec.json`, `docs/specs/advance-meta.md`, and `ADV_INSTRUCTIONS.md` to make the no-source-checklist-read boundary durable and command/skill ownership explicit.
tasks.notes: Added `rq-noSourceChecklistReads01` to advance-meta, bumped spec/docs to 1.11.0, and updated ADV_INSTRUCTIONS command/skill boundary to classify checklist docs as maintainer/reference only. Targeted asset test passes.

tasks.title: Run final verification for checklist-read boundary
tasks.verification: Final verification passed: `pnpm exec vitest run src/adv-skill-backed-commands-assets.test.ts src/adv-improve-assets.test.ts --reporter=dot` => 2 files, 83 tests passed; `pnpm run check` => typecheck, isolation, lockfile policy, lint, and format check passed. Exact command search for `docs/checklists/` and `~/.local/share/Advance` returned no runtime command matches.
tasks.implementation_summary: Verified the complete checklist-read boundary change. Also cleaned residual `adv-prep` wording to reference embedded methodology instead of skill/checklist wording before final verification.
tasks.notes: Final verification passed. Targeted asset tests: 2 files, 83 tests passed. `pnpm run check` passed. Runtime command search for `docs/checklists/` and `~/.local/share/Advance` found no matches.

proposal.approval_evidence: User approved proposal with reply: approve cleanup and proposal. Duplicates closed as superseded. B/F/S scan PASS; no critical findings.

discovery.approval_evidence: User approved agreement with reply: continue. Agreement persisted, ChangeContract minted with 23 items. Discovery checklist complete; no critical ambiguity findings. Follow-up agenda item ag-wg8YdGFm added for duplicate proposal prevention.

design.approval_evidence: Revised design resolves prior conflict by preserving embedded methodology and stripping source-checklist pointers. Independent validator returned CAUTION only; cautions carried into prep tasks: update existing Canonical source assertion and resolve adv-improve skill/checklist wording.

planning.approval_evidence: User approved prep task graph with reply: approve. Five tasks created with contract refs and TDD intent; ready to execute in change worktree.

execution.approval_evidence: All five planned tasks completed with checkpoints. Final verification passed: targeted asset tests (2 files, 83 tests) and `pnpm run check`; runtime command searches for `docs/checklists/` and `~/.local/share/Advance` returned no matches.

acceptance.approval_evidence: User accepted delivered work with reply: accept. Independent reviewer APPROVED/READY with no findings; contract review matrix has 23 rows and no failing rows; targeted tests and pnpm run check passed.

items.text: Runtime `adv-*` command files do not direct agents to follow/read `docs/checklists/*` for methodology.
Affected proposal/discovery/prep/review/harden/improve methodology remains available through skills or embedded fallback text without losing required workflow checks.
Automated tests fail if a runtime command reintroduces a directive to read source/install checklist files for reusable methodology.
ADV commands invoked from a non-Advance repository do not send agents searching `~/.local/share/Advance` for checklist methodology.
Durable guidance/spec surfaces describe the no-source-checklist-read boundary and command-vs-skill ownership.

Audit all runtime `.opencode/command/adv-*.md` references to `docs/checklists/*` and classify each as remove, replace with skill load, replace with embedded fallback, or maintainer-only documentation.
Replace runtime checklist-read directives with skill-backed methodology loading or embedded fallback instructions.
Add or update regression tests that inspect command assets and fail on runtime checklist-read directives.
Verify skill sibling-file sync remains sufficient for any methodology moved into skill reference files.
Add/refine a spec requirement for the durable runtime boundary.
Skills must remain read-only guidance and must not mutate ADV state, create tasks, complete gates, or own workflow sequencing.
Commands must continue to own user entry points, gate transitions, state mutation, and artifact persistence.
Do not solve this with path hacks, symlinks, environment-variable overrides, wrapper scripts, or hardcoded install paths.
Core ADV workflows must remain usable offline after skills are installed/synced.
Regression tests should be structural and low wording-churn where possible.
Do not instruct agents to read `~/.local/share/Advance/**` methodology files.
Do not duplicate large methodology blocks across many command files when a skill can own the reusable guidance cleanly.
Do not remove methodology coverage merely to shrink prompts.
Do not expand into redesigning the seven-gate workflow, Temporal state, or worktree mechanics.
Redesigning ADV gate semantics or approval checkpoints.
Changing ADV state storage, Temporal workflow behavior, or worktree lifecycle mechanics.
Removing maintainer-facing repo docs when they are no longer runtime instructions.
Implementing duplicate proposal prevention; tracked separately as agenda item `ag-wg8YdGFm`.

rows.evidence: Runtime command scan: no `.opencode/command` matches for `docs/checklists/`; reviewer contract assessment pass.
rows.notes: Commands no longer direct agents to source checklist files.

rows.evidence: Embedded methodology blocks and existing `skill("adv-improve")`/`skill("adv-slop-detection")` retained; targeted asset tests passed 83 tests.
rows.notes: Methodology remains available via embedded guidance or loaded skills.

rows.evidence: `pnpm exec vitest run src/adv-skill-backed-commands-assets.test.ts src/adv-improve-assets.test.ts --reporter=dot` passed: 2 files, 83 tests; regression test failed red before cleanup.
Runtime command scans found no `docs/checklists/` or `~/.local/share/Advance` matches; reviewer assessment pass.
rows.notes: Non-Advance repo invocation no longer receives source checklist path directives.

rows.evidence: `rq-noSourceChecklistReads01` added to advance-meta spec/docs; ADV_INSTRUCTIONS boundary updated.
Affected commands audited and updated: adv-proposal, adv-discover, adv-prep, adv-review, adv-harden, adv-improve.
rows.notes: All discovered runtime checklist references classified and removed/replaced.

rows.evidence: Command cleanup replaced checklist path directives with embedded runtime-source wording or existing skill/fallback wording.
Forbidden-pattern scan added in `plugin/src/adv-skill-backed-commands-assets.test.ts`; targeted tests passed 83 tests.
No new skill sibling files required; `adv-improve` skill already contains six-category methodology; existing skill loads preserved.
advance-meta spec bumped to 1.11.0 with `rq-noSourceChecklistReads01`; docs/specs mirror updated.
No skill files required state mutation; command/state ownership preserved; reviewer assessment pass.
Only command guidance/tests/spec/docs changed; no gate/state ownership moved to skills.
rows.notes: Commands continue owning workflow and state.

rows.evidence: No symlinks/env overrides/wrappers/hardcoded install paths added; source pointers removed.
Core workflows use embedded guidance or installed skills; no network dependency introduced.
Structural regex-based command asset scan added and passing.
Runtime command scan for `~/.local/share/Advance` returned no matches.
Did not add new single-command methodology skills or duplicate large blocks; reused embedded/skill guidance.
rows.notes: No large duplicate methodology blocks added.

rows.evidence: Embedded methodology and existing skills retained; only source path pointers removed.
No changes to gate semantics, Temporal state, or worktree mechanics.
No gate semantics redesign attempted.
No ADV state storage, Temporal workflow, or worktree lifecycle changes made.
Maintainer-facing checklist docs retained.
Duplicate proposal prevention tracked separately as agenda `ag-wg8YdGFm`; not implemented here.
